sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116391" key="w)/rugges" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὤρυγγες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n116391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">striped</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piebald horses</tr_> (including <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">zebras</tr_>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:317" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.317</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
